chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett No.D-1571 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.6168/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.6169/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of main case 24.09.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Muhammadi, Advocate for petitioner ************** 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the present Constitution Petition and submits that the petitioner intends to file a fresh petition after obtaining a new disability certificate from the Committee constituted in 2019 under the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018. Under these circumstances, the present Constitution Petition stands dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
